title: The Big Picture: Dark fleet demand
section_path: The Big Picture: Dark fleet demand
section_path_text: The Big Picture: Dark fleet demand
summary:
Main
What's next for the crude tanker dark fleet? Since the US hit Rosneft and Lukoil with sanctions virtually all shadow oil has been heading for the independent teapot refineries in China's Shandong region. Not only is the market for shadow crude shrinking, but so is the fleet available to move it.
